tooltip.simplybows.bow.bee.rune.bounty: Bees create a temporary beehive on impact that sends extra bees to attack nearby hostiles.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bee.rune.chaos: Arrows create a localised honey storm, granting allies regeneration, while slowing hostiles. Bees periodically fall from the sky and explode on impact.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bee.rune.grace: Shooting at allies will summon bees that orbit them, blocking the next incoming hit.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bee.rune.pain: Bees now home in on hostiles. Each String upgrade fires an additional bee.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.blossom.ability: Fires arrows that create small blossom storms.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.blossom.rune.boun: Multiple blossom storms can now be active at the same time. They no longer leap or deal damage over time, and instead deal heavy damage when hostiles step into them.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.blossom.rune.chao: Summons koi spirits that orbit the player, damaging hostiles on contact, and reflecting hostile projectiles.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.blossom.rune.grac: The blossom storm targets allies (including you), granting Swiftness and Haste, and damaging nearby hostiles.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.blossom.rune.pain: The blossom storm no longer leaps to new targets, but gains a much larger area and damages all hostiles caught within.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bubble.ability: Fires arrows unaffected by water drag, and create short-lived bubble columns.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bubble.rune.bount: The bubble column spawns an axolotl swarm damaging hostiles caught within.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bubble.rune.chaos: The bow now fires a wave that damages and knocks back hostiles.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bubble.rune.grace: A protective axolotl orbits the bubble column, blocking hostile projectiles, granting Resistance to allies, and slowing hostiles.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bubble.rune.pain: Fires axolotls. String upgrades allow you to fire additional axolotls.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.earth.ability: Fires arrows that cause earth tremors.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.earth.rune.bounty: Creates a massive central spike. Hostiles close the center take increased damage and knock-up.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.earth.rune.chaos: Arrows can sunder the earth, sending a trail of spikes that travel between nearby hostiles.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.earth.rune.grace: Now launches allies upward and grants Resistance and Slow Falling.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.earth.rune.pain: Spikes erupt outward from the center, dealing damage to enemies caught in their path.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.ability: Summons two magical bows that fire at nearby targets and mimic your own arrow shots.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.rune.bounty: One of the magical bows will now mirror your off-hand bow (cannot mirror another echo bow).
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.rune.chaos: Arrows now create a black hole on impact that pulls in hostiles and deals damage over time. Kills expand the black hole radius.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.rune.grace: Drinking a potion from the offhand charges the magical bows with its effects for a number of shots. If the potion has positive effects, the magical bows will target nearby allies.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.rune.pain: Magical bows focus your last target. When you or the magical bows kill a hostile, they will explode dealing area damage relative to their maximum HP.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.generic.rune.boun: Alters the behavior of a unique bow ability.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.generic.rune.chao: Alters the behavior of a unique bow ability.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.generic.rune.grac: Alters the behavior of a unique bow ability.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.generic.rune.pain: Alters the behavior of a unique bow ability.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.ability: Fires a fan of homing frost arrows.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.rune.bounty: Fires additional arrows, but they deal less damage.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.rune.chaos: Arrows now create a frost wall where they land. The wall blocks all entities and projectiles.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.rune.grace: Arrows apply stacking slowness on hit.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.rune.pain: Arrows focus on a single target and deal more damage.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.ability: Fires an arrow that cultivates a flower field, healing allies and harming enemies.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.rune.bounty: Hostiles that are killed within the flower field have a chance to drop bonus loot.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.rune.chaos: The flower field is replaced with a parasitic spore blossom. The spore blossom tendrils feed on those caught within their grasp, rooting smaller hostiles in place. When the blossom expires, it bursts, granting buffs to nearby allies.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.rune.grace: The flower field no longer damages hostiles, instead, it grows a cherry blossom that cleanses negative effects.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.rune.pain: The flower field no longer heals, and now damages more frequently.
tooltip.simplybows.upgrade_component.enc: Applies +1 Enchanted String to a unique bow.
tooltip.simplybows.upgrade_component.rei: Applies +1 Reinforced Frame to a unique bow.
tooltip.simplybows.upgrade_component.run: Applies Bounty Rune Etching to a unique bow.
Applies Chaos Rune Etching to a unique bow.
Applies Grace Rune Etching to a unique bow.
Applies a rune etching to a unique bow.
Applies Pain Rune Etching to a unique bow.
